assertion_results.evidence: final_message recommends the test-first discipline rather than silently rubber-stamping: 'The user mentioned they "already manually tested parseDate()" — manual testing is not TDD. The proper workflow required: 1. Delete any existing implementation 2. Write the test first (RED) 3. Watch it fail 4. Write minimal code to pass (GREEN)...' and 'NO PRODUCTION CODE WITHOUT A FAILING TEST FIRST'. The agent explicitly pushed back on tests-after and re-derived the code under a RED-GREEN cycle instead of confirming the existing implementation.
